title: Test and service 240 volt portable generators
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test and service 240 volt portable generators demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to undertake load test of portable generator

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace inspection and service procedures 1.3 Identify and manage hazards associated with the tasks1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to undertake load test of portable generator

elements.title: Conduct test and interpret results

pcs.text: Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications to determine service requirements2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications to determine service requirements2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and test system according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare test results with manufacturer specifications to determine service requirements2.3 Obtain authorisation to proceed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct test and interpret results

elements.title: Prepare to service generator

pcs.text: Analyse service options and select those most appropriate based on the circumstances3.2 Check and select tools, equipment and materials for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse service options and select those most appropriate based on the circumstances3.2 Check and select tools, equipment and materials for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse service options and select those most appropriate based on the circumstances3.2 Check and select tools, equipment and materials for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare to service generator

elements.title: Service generator

pcs.text: Service components, and adjust and replace as required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Run generator and perform resistive load test and compare with manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service components, and adjust and replace as required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Run generator and perform resistive load test and compare with manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service components, and adjust and replace as required according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems4.2 Run generator and perform resistive load test and compare with manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Service generator

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use5.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures5.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
